Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/graphics/p5-GD-Barcode/Makefile

Modified: head/graphics/p5-GD-Barcode/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/p5-GD-Barcode/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:51:57 2014	(r353432)
+++ head/graphics/p5-GD-Barcode/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:52:01 2014	(r353433)
@@ -8,9 +8,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	graphics perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	GD::Barcode - Create barcode image with GD
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-GD>=0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-GD
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
